hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.claude/learning/observations.json';let obs=[];try{obs=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'))}catch(e){}const sp='.agent/state.json';let state={};try{state=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(sp,'utf8'))}catch(e){}const count=(state.session_count||0)+1;if(count%10===0){obs.push({type:'session_milestone',session_count:count,note:'Run /agi-learn to process accumulated observations',timestamp:new Date().toISOString(),source:'hook-auto'})}state.session_count=count;state.last_session=new Date().toISOString();try{fs.mkdirSync('.claude/learning',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}fs.writeFileSync(p,JSON.stringify(obs,null,2));try{fs.mkdirSync('.agent',{recursive:true})}catch(e){}try{fs.writeFileSync(sp,JSON.stringify(state,null,2))}catch(e){}" 2>/dev/null || true
